title: Enable MFA on your primary email
description: Protect your main email account first. It is the recovery path for most other accounts.

steps.step: Open your email account security settings
steps.tooltip: Look for Security, Sign-in, or Account settings

steps.step: Turn on multi-factor authentication
steps.tooltip: Use an authenticator app when available

steps.step: Save recovery codes in a safe place
steps.tooltip: Needed if you lose your phone

title: Replace one reused password
description: Reduce credential-stuffing risk by making at least one critical account password unique today.

steps.step: Pick one high-value account (email, banking, cloud storage)
steps.tooltip: Start with the account you use for password resets

steps.step: Set a new unique password for that account
steps.tooltip: Use 14+ characters if possible

steps.step: Store it in a password manager or secure record
steps.tooltip: Avoid writing passwords in plain text notes

title: Review unknown sign-ins
description: Check recent account activity to catch unauthorized access early.

steps.step: Open sign-in history for email or social account
steps.tooltip: Most services show device, location, and time

steps.step: Sign out unknown sessions and mark suspicious activity
steps.tooltip: Force logout of unfamiliar devices

steps.step: Enable sign-in alerts
steps.tooltip: Get immediate notifications for new device logins

title: Update phone and laptop OS
description: Security patches close known vulnerabilities used in common attacks.

steps.step: Check for system updates on your phone
steps.tooltip: Install available security updates

steps.step: Check for updates on your primary computer
steps.tooltip: Restart if needed to finish patching

steps.step: Enable automatic security updates
steps.tooltip: Keeps protection current with less effort

title: Harden home Wi-Fi router
description: Router defaults are a common weak point in home network security.

steps.step: Change router admin password from default
steps.tooltip: Use a unique passphrase

steps.step: Set Wi-Fi security to WPA2 or WPA3
steps.tooltip: Avoid open and legacy encryption modes

steps.step: Disable WPS and remove unknown devices
steps.tooltip: Reduces unauthorized access paths

title: Practice phishing pause
description: Build anti-phishing habit by using a quick verification checklist before you click.

steps.step: Inspect sender address and link destination
steps.tooltip: Look for misspellings and odd domains

steps.step: Verify urgent requests through an official channel
steps.tooltip: Call the known number, not one from the message

steps.step: Report one suspicious message as phishing
steps.tooltip: Improves platform-level detection

title: Set delivery theft protections
description: Reduce package theft risk with delivery controls and safer drop-off settings.

steps.step: Enable delivery tracking alerts
steps.tooltip: Use carrier app notifications

steps.step: Set signature-required or hold-for-pickup for expensive items
steps.tooltip: Prevents unattended deliveries

steps.step: Add specific safe drop-off instructions
steps.tooltip: Use side door, lockbox, or concierge when possible

title: Review one local safety alert
description: Spend a few minutes on one verified local alert so your actions are based on current conditions.

steps.step: Open one verified local alert in Haven
steps.tooltip: Prefer official sources and monitored community reports

steps.step: Apply one recommended step from that alert
steps.tooltip: Small actions reduce paralysis and improve readiness

title: Emergency contact readiness
description: Confirm contacts and emergency settings in case of local incidents.

steps.step: Verify emergency contacts on your phone
steps.tooltip: Include one nearby trusted person

steps.step: Enable local emergency alerts on your device
steps.tooltip: Allow severe weather and public safety alerts

steps.step: Save local non-emergency police or city hotline
steps.tooltip: Use non-emergency channels for non-urgent reports

title: Vehicle break-in prevention
description: Apply quick habits that reduce break-in risk when parking in public areas.

steps.step: Remove visible valuables from the car
steps.tooltip: Do this before arrival when possible

steps.step: Choose a well-lit parking spot
steps.tooltip: Near entrances or active foot traffic is better

steps.step: Lock doors and verify windows are closed
steps.tooltip: Quick final check lowers opportunistic theft risk

title: Weather prep quick check
description: Complete a rapid readiness check when severe weather conditions are possible.

steps.step: Charge phone and backup battery
steps.tooltip: Power outages are common during severe events

steps.step: Identify your safest room or shelter location
steps.tooltip: Lowest interior room for tornado, high ground for flood

steps.step: Bring in loose outdoor items
steps.tooltip: Prevents avoidable property damage

title: Community verification habit
description: Separate verified information from rumors before sharing safety-related posts.

steps.step: Confirm one safety claim against an official source
steps.tooltip: City, county, emergency services, or major utility sources

steps.step: Share only verified update or choose not to forward
steps.tooltip: Reduces panic and false alarms
